name: Freelance Musician — Mixed Employment, Royalty, and Grant Income
description: Complete Mei-Lin Chen's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using the documents located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\chen\. Save the completed return as 'mei_lin_chen.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4002 (Business and Professional Income); SOCAN royalty guidelines
metadata.key_complexity: Four income streams feeding different lines: T4 (employment), T5 Box 17 (royalty/investment), T4A Box 020 (self-employment), T2125 (freelance). CCA Class 8 audio equipment.
